title: More Mob Drops
description: Diversifies the palette of mob drops
body:
Adds mob drops for: turtle, armadillo, piglin brute, piglin, ocelot, camel, villager, goat, frog, sniffer and pillager.


Turtle: Turtle scutes


Armadillo: Armadillo scutes


Piglin brute: gold ingots, gold nuggets


Piglin: gold nuggets, gold ingots


Ocelot: string


Camel: leather


Villager: emeralds, bread


Goat: goat horn


Frog: slimeballs


Sniffer: moss blocks


Pillager: emeralds

Adds armor trim drops for: Wither skeleton (Rib), Piglin brute (Snout), Shulker (Spire), Bogged (Wild), Pillager (Sentry), Husk (Dune), Drowned (Coast), Warden (Ward 90% and Silence 10%), Evoker (Vex)

Shulker now drops either 0 or 2 shells. With looting 3, drops shells every time
